raw_consumer_statement:
Company : Citibank Product : Credit card Issue : Unauthorized transactions/ Billing dispute Submitted by : XXXX XXXX XXXX I am filing a formal complaint against Citibank for failing to resolve a valid credit card billing dispute for charges related to a fraudulent and unsafe XXXX  stay. The reservation ( Confirmation Code : XXXX ) was booked for XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/year>, and charged in full ( ~ {$2500.00} ) to my Citibank Mastercard ending in XXXX. 

After multiple complaints and photographic documentation of the XXXX health and safety issues ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ), XXXX refunded {$1100.00} on XX/XX/year>, confirming the property was uninhabitable. 

I am now disputing the remaining balance of ~ {$1200.00} with Citibank, which includes an unauthorized charge for extended dates I never approved. 

However, Citibanks fraud team : Refused to escalate the matter to any department Evaded direct yes/no questions about my consumer rights Claimed there was no other team to speak with Hung up on me XXXX, despite being calm and asking legally relevant questions I have now escalated this to the Citibank Executive Response Unit , and submitted all documentation, including : XXXX partial refund confirmation Booking dates Citibanks call behavior and internal acknowledgment I am requesting : XXXX. Full reversal of the remaining XXXX charges ( ~ {$1200.00} ) XXXX. Investigation into XXXX mishandling of my dispute call XXXX Review of the recorded phone call by XXXX XXXX or compliance team This has caused severe emotional distress, and I feel that I am being retaliated against or dismissed due to being a woman asserting her rights over fraudulent merchant behavior. I am a professional, Ive documented everything, and I expect full accountability.
